name: Kraus Alabaster Table Lamp - CTL1039 - White/Gold - Safavieh Couture
description:
Illuminate your space with the Kraus Alabaster Table Lamp. This piece combines elegance and functionality, featuring a refined white and gold color scheme that complements any decor. Crafted from durable iron and finished in gold, it stands as a centerpiece of sophistication. The graceful design ensures it blends seamlessly into living rooms, bedrooms, or offices, adding a touch of luxury and style.

The soft light emitted creates a warm and inviting atmosphere, perfect for reading, relaxing, or entertaining. Whether placed on a side table or a desk, the lamp enhances the beauty and ambiance of your space. Let the Kraus Alabaster Table Lamp be the stylish element that ties your room together, elevating every moment spent in its glow.
